title: ADR-0022 Notification Types Catalog (W1)
description: Source of truth for notifications.type → delivery_mode mapping. Producers and the SQL helper public._delivery_mode_for(text) reference this catalog. Contract test tests/contracts/adr-0022-delivery-mode.test.mjs ensures the SQL helper stays in sync. New types added to notifications must be added here in the same migration.

delivery_modes.transactional_immediate: Sent within ~5 min via send-transactional-emails EF cron. Use for time-critical / high-priority notifications.
delivery_modes.digest_weekly: Bundled into weekly digest sent Saturday 12:00 UTC via send-weekly-member-digest EF. Default for most types.
delivery_modes.suppress: In-app only. Never emailed. Use for low-priority / per-cycle aggregated noise.

volunteer_agreement_signed.rationale: Confirmation that volunteer signed the term — receipt is timely + carries verification code.

ip_ratification_gate_pending.rationale: Workflow gate awaiting member action — bundling would slow IP ratification chain.

system_alert.rationale: Operational alert (cron failure, capacity issue, etc.) — must page admins now.

certificate_ready.rationale: Counter-signed certificate ready for download — recipient expects within minutes.

member_offboarded.rationale: Stakeholder fan-out on offboard — leadership awareness is time-sensitive.

attendance_detractor.rationale: Per-cycle detractor pattern — surfaced in admin dashboards. Email-spamming would amplify noise.

info.rationale: Catch-all info bucket. Treat as in-app only until specific types are split out.

attendance_reminder.rationale: Default to digest. Producers may set 'transactional_immediate' for events <48h away (W2 §3.2).

governance_vote_reminder.rationale: Default to digest. Producers may set 'transactional_immediate' for deadlines <7 days (W2 §3.2).

tribe_broadcast.rationale: Default to digest. Leader can pass urgent=true to set 'transactional_immediate' (W2 §3.2). W3 may add 1/week rate limit.

assignment_new.rationale: Card assigned — bundle in weekly digest unless assignee preferences override.

card_status_changed.rationale: Card moved between columns — low-urgency status update.

webinar_status_confirmed.rationale: Webinar published/confirmed — preserved EF V1 behavior. Revisit in W2 to bundle if confirmation lead time is short.

certificate_issued.rationale: Issued ≠ ready (pre-counter-sign). Member sees in-app + bundled email.

ip_ratification_chain_approved.rationale: Chain fully approved — submitter expects timely confirmation. Preserved EF V1 behavior; revisit in W2 if community-wide bundling is preferred.

ip_ratification_gate_advanced.rationale: Gate advanced — recipient may need to act on next gate. Preserved EF V1 behavior.

ip_ratification_awaiting_members.rationale: Members ratification gate — eligibility window is time-bounded. Preserved EF V1 behavior.

webinar_status_completed.rationale: Webinar happened — recipient may want to access recording immediately.

webinar_status_cancelled.rationale: Webinar cancelled — must inform registered attendees promptly.

weekly_card_digest_member.rationale: Already a pre-aggregated digest output (generated by generate_weekly_card_digest_cron Saturday 12 UTC). Routes via transactional EF for prompt delivery; not raw notification data.

governance_cr_new.rationale: New Change Request — voters need awareness window for review.

governance_cr_vote.rationale: Vote cast — submitter expects real-time confirmation.

governance_cr_approved.rationale: CR reached quorum — implementer needs to know now.

sponsor_finance_entry_logged.rationale: ADR-0043 governance safeguard — non-volunteer sponsor logged a cost/revenue entry. manage_platform holders need timely visibility for governance oversight.

governance_manual_proposed.rationale: ADR-0044 2-of-N approval — 2nd manage_platform signoff required within 24h to publish a new manual version. Used both for proposal-fanout (asks for 2nd signoff) and final-publish-fanout (informs chapter board + sponsors). Time-critical (24h window).

implementation.partial_index: idx_notifications_digest_pending ON (recipient_id, created_at) WHERE delivery_mode = 'digest_weekly' AND digest_delivered_at IS NULL

ef_routing.transactional_immediate: send-transactional-emails (cron */5 min) — picks rows where delivery_mode = 'transactional_immediate' AND email_sent_at IS NULL
ef_routing.digest_weekly: send-weekly-member-digest (cron Saturday 12:00 UTC) — aggregates rows per recipient where delivery_mode = 'digest_weekly' AND digest_delivered_at IS NULL AND created_at < last_saturday_12h
ef_routing.suppress: Never picked by either EF — in-app only

next_waves.W2: Implement get_weekly_member_digest() RPC + Saturday digest content. Add settings UI for 4-mode opt-out.
next_waves.W3: Leader digest, smart-skip empty digest, broadcast rate-limit (1/week).
